definition: Someone who has gone forth from household life into renunciation.
notes: The project uses renunciant as the default because it names the person's chosen mode of life without narrowing the term to a monk or making renunciation sound like a one-time event. Keep this distinct from bhikkhu and bhikkhuni when the passage has not specified ordination status. Do not rotate renunciate into the house default; it can read as an action or process rather than the person described by pabbajita.

context_rules.context: When the passage contrasts household and gone-forth life
When the passage specifically names an ordained monk or nun
context_rules.notes: Use the more specific term entry instead of forcing pabbajita to carry ordination status.

example_phrases.notes: Shows the household-life contrast that governs the default rendering.
